description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'Data_Quality_Normalizer' to standardize inconsistent patient data. The channel must accept HL7 v2.x messages via a TCP Listener on port 6661 (MLLP) and write them to a File Writer at '/tmp/normalized_output/' with the filename 'normalized_${message.messageId}.hl7'. Use JavaScript transformers to normalize PID segment fields: Phone (PID-13) to '(XXX) XXX-XXXX' by stripping non-digits and removing leading '1's from 11-digit numbers (leaving the field unchanged if not 10 digits after cleanup); DOB (PID-7) to 'YYYYMMDD' from 'MM/DD/YYYY', 'YYYY-MM-DD', or 'YYYYMMDD' formats; and Gender (PID-8) by mapping 'Male'/'MALE'/'1' to 'M', 'Female'/'FEMALE'/'2' to 'F', and 'Other'/'3' to 'O' (defaulting to 'U'). The channel's functionality should be verified using the test messages located in '/tmp/test_hl7_messages/'.
